batch_analysis_config.description: Configuration file for batch audio analysis. Use the heuristic weight guidance below (or auto_extract) for your instrument collection.
batch_analysis_config.comment_weight_mode: Options: 'auto_extract' (extract weights per file from actual energy) or 'fixed' (use fixed weights for all files)

fixed_weights.comment: Only used if weight_mode is 'fixed'. For musical instruments, typical ranges: harmonic 0.85-0.95, inharmonic 0.05-0.15

recommended_for_musical_instruments.reasoning: For stable musical notes from instruments (piano, violin, trumpet, etc.), harmonic energy typically dominates (85-95%). Fixed weights of 0.90/0.10 provide consistent comparison across files while allowing some variation for different instrument types.

recommended_for_percussion.reasoning: Percussive sounds have more balanced harmonic/inharmonic content. Use 0.50/0.50 for drums, cymbals, etc.

recommended_for_mixed_collection.reasoning: For mixed collections (instruments + percussion), use intermediate weights. Auto-extract mode is recommended for mixed collections.
